sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Mueller Industries Announces Sixth Consecutive Dividend Increase
feed.summary: Mueller Industries has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.35 per share, marking its sixth consecutive increase and a 40% rise over 2025. The dividend is scheduled for payment on March 27, 2026, with a record date of March 13, 2026. This reflects the company's sustained profitability and commitment to shareholder returns, as it continues to operate across major global markets in critical distribution sectors.

feed.title: CHD Analyst Ratings: TD Cowen Raises Price Target to $112 | CHD Stock News
feed.summary: TD Cowen has maintained its "Hold" rating on Church & Dwight Co (CHD) but increased its price target to $112, reflecting a 13.13% raise. This follows a trend of several analysts recently upgrading CHD's ratings and raising price targets, indicating growing optimism. The average analyst price target for CHD is $102.28, with current estimates suggesting a downside of 0.79% from its current price, while GuruFocus estimates a 4.55% upside based on its fair value calculations.

feed.title: Kaiser Aluminum (NASDAQ:KALU) Stock Price Down 4.8% - Here's Why
feed.summary: Kaiser Aluminum (NASDAQ:KALU) saw its stock price drop by 4.8% on Friday, trading down to $120.9020 on lower-than-average volume. This decline follows a mix of recent news, including a slight EPS miss in its Q4 earnings despite beating revenue estimates, and mixed analyst sentiment with some upgrades and some neutral ratings. The company recently announced a quarterly dividend of $0.77 per share.

feed.title: Infosys CEO Salil Parekh on AI tools replacing engineers: It is not that overnight everything is going to be replaced as in large companies ... - The Times of India Edition IN
feed.summary: Infosys CEO Salil Parekh believes that AI tools will not replace engineers overnight, but rather coexist with the existing technology in large enterprises. He expects the Indian IT industry to thrive, leveraging AI services which he estimates to be a $300-400 billion market within the overall $1.5 trillion tech services market. Parekh also noted an improving business environment, especially in the US, and highlighted Infosys's continued hiring of college graduates and active AI strategy focusing on client solutions and legacy modernization.

feed.title: Bank of Montreal (TSE:BMO) Sets New 1-Year High After Analyst Upgrade
feed.summary: Bank of Montreal (TSE:BMO) reached a new 52-week high after Barclays raised its price target from C$181 to C$196, leading to the stock trading as high as C$198.73. Other firms also increased their price targets, though the consensus rating for BMO remains a "Hold" with an average price target of C$193.42. The company reported C$3.28 earnings per share on C$9.34 billion revenue for the last quarter.

feed.title: Employee sues Lockheed Martin, claims HR ignored months of harassment
feed.summary: A federal lawsuit has been filed against Lockheed Martin and its subsidiary Sikorsky Aircraft Corporation, alleging that an employee was fired after reporting months of harassment, which culminated in a physical attack. The lawsuit claims that the company's HR department failed to address the employee's concerns despite multiple appeals. The plaintiff is seeking compensatory damages and a jury trial for hostile working environment and retaliation under Title VII and Connecticut law.

feed.title: GSK (LON:GSK) Insider Purchases £73,981.46 in Stock
feed.summary: GSK insider Wendy Becker recently purchased 3,334 shares of GSK stock for £73,981.46 on February 20th, with an average cost of GBX 2,219 per share. This follows an earlier purchase of 441 shares in December for £7,977.69. GSK shares traded at GBX 2,223.16 on Friday, and analysts maintain a "Hold" consensus rating with an average price target of GBX 1,917.86.

feed.title: Thomas Kean Jr makes strategic moves in Abbott Laboratories and General Motors
feed.summary: Thomas Kean Jr, a representative for New Jersey’s 7th congressional district, recently made a new stock purchase of Abbott Laboratories (ABT) valued between $1,001 and $15,000, through the Kean Family Partnership. This move is notable as ABT is trading near its 52-week low and is considered undervalued by InvestingPro. Additionally, Kean Jr sold portions of his stakes in several companies, including General Motors (GM), Johnson & Johnson (JNJ), Markel Group Inc. (MKL), Microsoft Corporation (MSFT), and Stryker Corporation (SYK).

feed.title: Oracle drops a truckload of CX-centric generative AI agents
feed.summary: Oracle has released a new set of generative AI agents designed for customer experience (CX) users across marketing, sales, and service functions. These agents aim to automate and streamline various tasks, from campaign planning and sales outreach to quote generation and customer service interactions. The company leveraged insights from customer pain points and internal hackathons to develop these task-oriented tools, with experts highlighting the significant efficiency gains they offer, especially in content creation for marketers and complex processes like quote generation.

feed.title: NVR pitches 1,000-unit Prince William development bordering Digital Gateway
feed.summary: NVR is proposing a 1,010-unit residential development on 213.7 acres of agricultural land in Prince William County, along Catharpin Valley Drive. This project would border the Digital Gateway and replace a rural area with new homes. The proposal was reported by Janani Jana of the Washington Business Journal on February 20, 2026.

feed.title: Flowers Foods Keeps Quarterly Dividend at $0.2475 per Share, Payable March 20 to Shareholders of Record March 6
feed.summary: Flowers Foods (NYSE: FLO) has announced that it will maintain its quarterly dividend of $0.2475 per share. This dividend is payable on March 20, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 6, 2026. The company, a producer and marketer of packaged bakery foods, has made this declaration following recent earnings reports and analyst adjustments to its price target.

feed.title: NASDAQ: PYPL: Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP Announces the Filing of a Securities Fraud Class Action Lawsuit Against PayPal Holdings, Inc.
feed.summary: Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP has filed a securities fraud class action lawsuit against PayPal Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: PYPL) on behalf of investors who purchased common stock between February 25, 2025, and February 2, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that PayPal made materially false statements regarding its revenue outlook and growth, particularly concerning its Branded Checkout offerings. Investors have until April 20, 2026, to seek lead plaintiff status, following a significant stock drop after PayPal announced a leadership change and missed earnings estimates on February 3, 2026.

feed.title: Nissan, Honda revive collaboration talks after failed merger
feed.summary: Nissan and Honda have revived collaboration talks after failed merger negotiations from late 2024 and early 2025. Nissan CEO Ivan Espinosa described the discussions as "very constructive and very positive," primarily focusing on collaboration in North America due to market challenges and tariffs. While specific details are scarce, the talks appear to have been well-received by Nissan investors, with the company's stock rising over 13%.

feed.title: ConocoPhillips considers selling Permian assets worth $2 billion, Bloomberg News reports By Reuters
feed.summary: ConocoPhillips is reportedly exploring the sale of some of its Permian Basin assets as part of a portfolio streamlining effort. These assets, acquired through previous deals with Concho Resources and Shell, are expected to be valued at approximately $2 billion. The potential sale was reported by Bloomberg News, citing unnamed sources familiar with the matter.

feed.title: Sherwin-Williams wins contempt case after ex-employee posts alleged secrets online
feed.summary: An Ohio appellate court upheld a contempt ruling against a former Sherwin-Williams employee, Brett Combs, who refused to remove confidential company information posted on his personal website after his termination. Combs had signed an agreement to protect confidential information in exchange for severance but allegedly breached it and a subsequent court order. The case serves as a reminder for HR teams about the enforceability of post-employment agreements and court orders regarding confidential information.

feed.title: Will California Resources (CRC) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
feed.summary: California Resources Corporation (CRC) is predicted to beat its upcoming earnings estimates, extending its consistent streak of beating expectations. The company has a positive Zacks Earnings ESP of +9.28% and a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold), indicators that historically lead to earnings beats. CRC is expected to release its next earnings report on March 2, 2026.

feed.title: NASDAQ: PYPL: Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP Announces the Filing of a Securities Fraud Class Action Lawsuit Against PayPal Holdings, Inc.
feed.summary: Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP has filed a securities fraud class action lawsuit against PayPal Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: PYPL) on behalf of investors who purchased common stock between February 25, 2025, and February 2, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that PayPal made materially false statements regarding its revenue outlook and growth, leading to a significant stock drop after a leadership change and missed earnings estimates on February 3, 2026. Investors have until April 20, 2026, to seek lead plaintiff status.

feed.title: Gen Digital stock hits 52-week low at 22.13 USD
feed.summary: Gen Digital Inc.'s stock has fallen to a 52-week low of $22.13, reflecting a 28% decline over the past six months and an 18.04% drop over the last year. Despite this downturn, InvestingPro data suggests the stock may be undervalued, boasting an impressive gross profit margin of 79%. The company recently surpassed Q3 2026 earnings expectations, and Fitch Ratings revised its outlook to stable from negative.

feed.title: Will Celsius (CELH) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
feed.summary: Celsius Holdings Inc. (CELH) has a strong history of beating earnings estimates, with an average surprise of 77.17% over the last two quarters. With a positive Zacks Earnings ESP of +6.46% and a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold), the company is well-positioned for another earnings beat in its upcoming report, expected around February 26, 2026. Investors are advised to utilize the Earnings ESP Filter to identify potential opportunities.

feed.title: Evergy (NASDAQ:EVRG) Price Target Raised to $83.00 at Wells Fargo & Company
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has raised its price target for Evergy (NASDAQ:EVRG) from $79.00 to $83.00, maintaining an "equal weight" rating, which suggests a potential upside of 3.69%. This adjustment comes despite Evergy missing its Q4 EPS consensus and providing FY-2026 EPS guidance below some Street expectations. The company also declared a quarterly dividend, announced new customers, and outlined a substantial five-year capital expenditure plan, which is seen as supportive for long-term growth but introduces near-term execution risks.

feed.title: Comfort Systems USA (FIX) Surges as Data Center ‘Industrial Supercycle’ Drives Record Q4 Profits
feed.summary: Comfort Systems USA (FIX) shares surged over 12% after reporting record Q4 earnings, driven by an "industrial supercycle" in data center construction, especially for AI infrastructure. The company's focus on specialized HVAC and electrical services for high-density AI facilities led to a massive backlog of $11.94 billion and 41.7% year-over-year revenue growth. FIX is benefiting from the industry's shift to liquid cooling and modular "AI Factories," positioning itself as a critical partner in the AI boom.

feed.title: Gerdau SA expected to post earnings of 45 centavos a share - Earnings Preview
feed.summary: Gerdau SA (GGBR3) is projected to report earnings of 45 centavos per share, according to this Refinitiv earnings preview. The article provides a brief outlook on the Brazilian stock's upcoming financial results.

feed.title: PayPal Is Back Near IPO-Era Prices—Value Setup or Value Trap?
feed.summary: PayPal's stock (PYPL) has fallen to near its IPO-era prices, trading just above $40, and its P/E ratio has collapsed to a historic low of 7.67. This presents a potential contrarian opportunity due to its durable profitability, deep market embedment, and extremely oversold technical indicators, despite concerns about slowing growth and competitive pressures. With a leadership transition underway, a strategic reset could shift sentiment and unlock significant upside, according to some analysts who maintain Buy ratings.

feed.title: What's Going On With Envirotech Vehicles Stock Friday?
feed.summary: Envirotech Vehicles (NASDAQ: EVTV) stock rose Friday following an announcement from Azio AI Corporation. Azio AI received its first purchase order from Envirotech for twenty-eight next-generation ASIC compute systems, with payment received for the initial tranche. These systems will be deployed within EVTV’s infrastructure and will support SHA-256 compute workloads for Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC/USD) yields.

feed.title: Ecopetrol achieves highest reserve additions in four years
feed.summary: Ecopetrol reported its highest reserve additions in four years at the close of 2025, with net proven reserves increasing by 2.7% to 1.944 billion barrels of oil equivalent (MBPE). Despite a decrease in the Brent benchmark price, the company achieved a Reserves Replacement Index (IRR) of 121%, adding 300 MBPE of proven reserves. This success was attributed to enhanced recovery projects, optimized operational management in key fields, and contractual agreements, demonstrating Ecopetrol's commitment to value generation.

feed.title: eBay (EBAY): Focus category momentum and a boost to fashion recommerce
feed.summary: eBay (EBAY) saw its shares rise after reporting strong double-digit growth in sales and earnings for the fourth quarter of 2025. The company's focus categories, especially collectibles, and its expansion into fashion recommerce through the acquisition of Depop, were key drivers of this performance. For Q1 2026, eBay projects continued revenue and GMV growth, along with an increase in adjusted EPS.

feed.title: Oracle, Google among market cap stock movers on Friday
feed.summary: This article highlights significant stock movers on Friday, including mega-cap, large-cap, mid-cap, and small-cap companies. Oracle and Akamai Technologies saw declines, while Google and Ringcentral experienced rallies due to various market factors and company-specific news. Key factors influencing these movements include analyst ratings, investment talks, and project developments.

feed.title: Abbott Laboratories (ABT) Maintains Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Abbott Laboratories (ABT) has announced it will maintain its quarterly dividend at $0.63 per share, reflecting a 2.26% forward yield and demonstrating a commitment to steady investor returns. The company shows strong financial health with a robust balance sheet, efficient operations, and valuation metrics suggesting potential undervaluation near historical lows. Despite sector-specific risks, its diversified revenue streams and global reach position it well for future stability and growth.

feed.title: Kosmos Energy (KOS) Leads Oil and Gas Stock Surge in 2026
feed.summary: Kosmos Energy (KOS) has shown a remarkable 95.06% year-to-date increase, leading the oil and gas sector's surge in 2026, with other companies like Texas Pacific Land and W&T Offshore also seeing significant gains. Despite this impressive stock performance, Kosmos Energy faces financial challenges including a negative operating margin, high debt-to-equity ratio, and a distressed Altman Z-Score, coupled with recent insider selling. Investors are advised to consider these financial health risks and market volatility, even as institutional ownership remains strong.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Maintains iRhythm Holdings (IRTC) Rating, Lowers Price Target
feed.summary: Wells Fargo analyst Nathan Treybeck has maintained an "Overweight" rating for iRhythm Holdings (IRTC) but reduced the price target from $225.00 to $200.00. This adjustment comes amidst varying analyst perspectives on the company, although the average target price from 14 analysts suggests a potential upside of 44.13% from the current price. iRhythm Holdings specializes in digital healthcare, offering device-based technology for ambulatory cardiac monitoring.

feed.title: PNC FINANCIAL SERVICES GROUP, INC. SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. has released its 2025 10-K report, showcasing robust financial performance with significant increases in total revenue and net income. The report highlights strategic initiatives including the acquisition of FirstBank Holding Company and plans for expanding its banking franchise and digital platforms. Despite an anticipated slower economic growth in 2026, PNC projects continued growth in loans and revenue, while acknowledging challenges from economic, regulatory, and climate-related risks.

feed.title: Choice Hotels' Simone Wu to Retire as SVP, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary
feed.summary: Choice Hotels announced that Simone Wu, their Senior Vice President, General Counsel, Corporate Secretary & External Affairs, plans to retire in the first half of 2026. She will continue in her role until a successor is appointed to ensure an orderly transition. This information was disclosed in an SEC filing on February 20, 2026.

feed.title: Earnings Preview For DMC Glb
feed.summary: DMC Glb (NASDAQ: BOOM) is scheduled to release its quarterly earnings report on Monday, February 23, 2026. Analysts project an earnings per share (EPS) of $-0.13 for the company. Investors will be watching for the company to surpass estimates and provide positive guidance, especially considering a previous earnings miss that led to an 18.62% drop in share price.

feed.title: A Preview Of Freightos's Earnings
feed.summary: Freightos (NASDAQ: CRGO) is scheduled to release its quarterly earnings on Monday, February 23, 2026. Analysts are expecting an EPS of $-0.08, and investors will be looking for improved performance and positive guidance. The article also notes that the stock has declined by 40.85% over the last 52 weeks, potentially disappointing long-term shareholders.

feed.title: Electric-car maker Lucid lays off hundreds of workers
feed.summary: Electric-car manufacturer Lucid Group Inc. has announced layoffs affecting hundreds of workers. The Newark-based company is cutting positions to improve gross margins, though production staff at its Arizona factory will not be impacted. This move comes amid a series of recent layoffs in the Bay Area.

feed.title: 11 Analysts Assess Blackstone: What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Eleven analysts have recently rated Blackstone (NYSE: BX), with an average price target of $169.82, a 4.65% decrease from the previous average. While the company demonstrates strong revenue growth and returns on equity and assets, it faces challenges with its net margin and a high debt-to-equity ratio. The article details individual analyst actions, current ratings, and price targets, offering insights into Blackstone's market perception and financial health.

feed.title: Liquid Networx Announces Dedicated and Resident Fortinet Engineer Engagements for Enterprise Clients
feed.summary: Liquid Networx, a national Fortinet partner and the first Fortinet Engage Preferred Services Partner (EPSP) in North America, is now offering dedicated and resident certified Fortinet engineers for enterprise clients. This service provides expert design, implementation, and ongoing support for Fortinet solutions such as SASE, Zero Trust, and the Fortinet Security Fabric. The EPSP designation highlights Liquid Networx's ability to expertly deploy and maintain security solutions, aiding organizations in their digital acceleration efforts.

feed.title: Smart Money Is Betting Big In FDX Options
feed.summary: Financial giants show a bullish interest in FedEx (NYSE: FDX), with 18 unusual options trades detected, predominantly calls. Analysis of trading volumes and open interest suggests a predicted price range between $240.0 and $500.0 for FedEx over the next three months. The stock's current price is up 1.07% at $387.25, and analysts maintain an average target price of $397.4.

feed.title: Burlington Stores Stock Jumps on Earnings Beat: Is the Rally Just Starting?
feed.summary: Burlington Stores Inc (BURL) recently reported stronger-than-expected earnings and guidance, causing its stock to jump. This performance highlights the resilience of the off-price retail model, with strong traffic, margin recovery, and inventory management. The key question for investors is whether Burlington can maintain this momentum and justify its new valuation, especially given its sensitivity to the US consumer market and current valuation levels.

feed.title: NIPSCO accepting applications for its Environmental Action Grants through April 3
feed.summary: NIPSCO, with support from the NiSource Charitable Foundation, is accepting applications for its 2026 Environmental Action Grant until April 3. This annual grant funds environmental projects and programming across NIPSCO’s service area, focusing on initiatives that protect natural resources and strengthen communities. Grants ranging from $500 to $5,000 will be awarded to eligible 501(c)3 or non-profit organizations for environmentally focused projects.

feed.title: Colgate-Palmolive Stock: Quiet Giant Making a Loud Move in 2026
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive, historically considered a "boring toothpaste stock," is now viewed as a strong dividend-and-AI play by Wall Street. The company has achieved record highs by raising prices, investing in premium products, and leveraging AI for marketing and demand forecasting. Despite concerns about valuation and competition, analysts consider it a solid "hold" or "selective buy" for investors seeking stability and consistent dividends rather than explosive growth.

feed.title: Charlotte steel giant Nucor fills CFO role as part of C-suite shakeup
feed.summary: Nucor Corp., a Charlotte-based steelmaker, has appointed an internal candidate with strong local connections to fill its CFO position. This change is part of a broader C-suite shakeup within the company. The article also mentions upcoming events hosted by the Charlotte Business Journal, including the 2026 Women in Business Awards and the Most Admired CEO Awards.

feed.title: Home Construction Rebound Looks Shaky, Says Analyst
feed.summary: Despite a monthly increase in December 2025 housing starts, Bank of America Securities (BofA) remains cautious about the home construction rebound, highlighting a year-over-year decline and significant weakness in single-family home construction. BofA considers single-family permits a more accurate indicator than overall starts and anticipates further declines in single-family starts for 2026 before a modest recovery in 2027, with multifamily construction driving most growth. While easing mortgage rates and rising MBA purchase applications offer some positive signals, the firm views these as early stabilization rather than a robust recovery.

feed.title: Eileen Kamerick Sells 6,600 Shares of Associated Banc-Corp (ASB)
feed.summary: Eileen Kamerick, a Director at Associated Banc-Corp (ASB), sold 6,600 shares of the company on February 19, 2026, bringing her total holdings to 49,264 shares. This transaction is part of a trend of insider selling at ASB, with 11 insider sells and one buy over the past year. The stock is currently trading at $28.02, appearing fairly valued against its GF Value.

feed.title: Kodiak Sciences (NASDAQ:KOD) Shares Down 5.9% - Here's What Happened
feed.summary: Kodiak Sciences (NASDAQ:KOD) saw its stock price drop by 5.9% on Friday, with significantly lower trading volume than average. Despite the dip, analysts generally maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average price target of $28.29. Additionally, a director recently made a substantial insider purchase of 2,608,696 shares, increasing their holdings to over 18 million shares.

feed.title: James Fishback’s Azoria ETFs collapsed months after launch amid legal, financial scrutiny
feed.summary: James Fishback's Azoria Capital dissolved its two main exchange-traded funds (ETFs) less than six months after their launch due to limited investor interest and ongoing legal challenges faced by Fishback, who is also a Florida gubernatorial candidate. The liquidation comes after a federal judge ordered Fishback to surrender Azoria stock to satisfy a judgment owed to his former employer, Greenlight Capital. Fishback's political campaign is also facing scrutiny over fundraising, personal finances, and controversial rhetoric.

feed.title: Deadline Alert: Inovio Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (INO) Shareholders Who Lost Money Urged To Contact Glancy Prongay Wolke & Rotter LLP About Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: Glancy Prongay Wolke & Rotter LLP is urging Inovio Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (INO) shareholders who suffered losses to contact them regarding a securities fraud lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Inovio made misleading statements about its INO-3107 BLA submission timeline and its eligibility for accelerated FDA approval, leading to significant stock price drops. Investors have until April 7, 2026, to file a lead plaintiff motion.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Lowers Price Target for Insmed (INSM) Amid Overweight Rating | INSM Stock News
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has lowered its price target for Insmed (INSM) from $234.00 to $208.00 while maintaining an "Overweight" rating. This adjustment comes amidst other recent analyst updates for INSM from firms like Morgan Stanley, Barclays, Roth Capital, RBC Capital, and UBS, reflecting varied assessments of the biopharmaceutical company's future performance. Despite the reduced target, the average analyst price target for INSM suggests a significant upside from its current price, although GuruFocus' GF Value estimates a potential downside.

feed.title: Texas sues Sanofi for allegedly 'bribing' providers to boost drug prescriptions
feed.summary: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton has filed a lawsuit against Sanofi, accusing the French drugmaker of "bribing" healthcare providers to prescribe its medications over competitors. The lawsuit alleges that Sanofi's programs offering services to providers violated the Texas Health Care Program Fraud Prevention Act. Sanofi denies the allegations, stating its services comply with laws and support patients without influencing prescribing decisions.

feed.title: Copart (CPRT) Stock Falls After Q4 Earnings Report - Revenue and EPS Below Estimates - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Copart (CPRT) stock declined by 3.5% after its Q4 earnings report revealed revenue of $1.12 billion and earnings per share of $0.36, both falling below Wall Street expectations. The company also experienced a contracted operating margin and missed adjusted EBITDA estimates, leading to a negative investor reaction. Despite historically low volatility, the significant price movement indicates the market's concern over these financial results, with the stock now 4% down year-to-date and 43.2% below its 52-week high.
